input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that execute full Maven builds may touch the filesystem, local repository, settings, or network unless written to use temporary projects and offline/local inputs.
The existing compile failure should be fixed by adapting tests to the 2.0.7 ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructor signatures rather than adding setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. The resolved org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 POM already brings its normal ClassWorlds, Plexus, Maven component, and Wagon dependencies; the reported javac failure is due to Maven 2.0.7 API constructor signature changes, not missing setup.
